{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032206313132B499294A4504572875"}"},"total":532},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7520538404561715992","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太爽了，本来是解闷看看，越看越上头，然后就看完了，主角中国人穿越，实力世界最强，正反都有脑子，逻辑自洽。还有PS小评论生动有趣，结拜俩义弟萨卡斯基和凯多"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1751013318,"group_id":"7506372007726943294","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"咸鱼是自己的性格，躺平是自己的目标，划水是自己的行动。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzQzgO1B1lF0QKVBUVjYJl130p9cuDVTmH05lNsbwrTR","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/58d41f807f8343f0b9d43e272c1f718c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710358&x-signature=7ZdtRUHHGJBGaYJG2PIPakQQpIo%3D","user_id":"4169779216123307","user_name":"爱吃酿米酒的蒋建平"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4169779216123307","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":8,"fan_ranklist_title":"真爱粉","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1777256721,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":24,"name":"气氛达人","small_url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/b7c8672db629fbb3d8f83a83721675dc~tplv-noop.image","sticker_type":2,"url":"http://p6-novel.byteimg.com/novel-static/d2c24adfe48394cad03d7b1d29d70622~tplv-noop.image"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7506372007726943294","book_info":{"abstract":"致敬爱的读者：

  “您是否曾意识到，因为我们接受的教育、传承的文明和拥有的历史的共同塑造，某种程度上我们是人均全身反骨的‘造反圣体’？”

  “它在‘外界’的视角下恐怕十分明显，在‘异界’的视角下则注定更加明显，相信经常穿越的朋友一定深有体会。”

  “毕竟推翻黑暗腐朽的世界的思想信念，或许已经融入我们的本能，一旦具备相应条件，便驱使不愿忍受的我们付诸实际行动。”

  “至少……”

  “当我穿越这个由天龙人主宰的世界，感触超乎想象的黑暗腐朽后，我选择遵从本能，我现在只想造反！造天龙人的反！给那群类人虫豸尝尝人民的铁拳！”

  “大业初始，前途艰辛却光明，由于缺乏搞钱的时间，厚颜诚邀各路豪杰慷慨襄助，资金请通过本书渠道转赠，事成必有重谢。”

   ——夏杰。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o4faf54c166111be811c973ba4bdbb190~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"花了脸的猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7506372007726943294","book_name":"海贼：我现在只想造反","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7506372142619968062","read_count":"38360","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"850523"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"368","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,海贼,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4085df73e4abc86c3b99da6e286dee39~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779316291&x-signature=40MD46r4CgJJ0i6We6oo5p%2Feff0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"198339768371748","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"68"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032206313132B499294A4504572875"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":
